reviews.review_description: I used to play this game all the time back in '23 and it never disappointed me and I genuinely had a great time with the community.
Idk what to say. It's gone please just altleast remake the game.
This game was alot of fun and i hope it comes back one day

It was a great mix of fun and scary it used to be active all the time but now you cant play. Trapping people behind doors while the monster came and making friends. It was a masterpiece now long forgotten in the graveyard of other similar games that are now dead. RIP Catos
Its dead I miss the days

reviews.review_title: Some of the best times ive had but...
reviews.review_description: Had so many good times... so many freinds "made" lol... this was THE GAME back then... now no one plays it...
This was the best game ever but no one plays it anymore.. rip to the game kinda.
I remember playing this game with a lot of people now.. no one’s playing? Is it just me or no one is playing anymore?
I can't play catos vr cuz its need at update but it does have no update tried to restart and it didnt work can i get rip in the chat

developer_response.body:
Game is back with massive update!
Please consider changing the review

reviews.review_description: Edward, this game is literally amazing. It’s a really cool twist on gtag horror, with a unique AI. While I can’t donate, I will mentally supporyt your game Al the way. This game has already come so far!! I literally just can’t wait to see what’s next. Seriously, I mean all of this! I play this game so much it’s not even funny. You are such a nice guy Edward and I hope your game becomes one of the most popular. - Bonk from Discord❤️❤️
The game says I need to update it even though I have now I'm stuck in this crappy elevator and I cant do anything #fixyourgame

developer_response.body: Hello. We are sorry that you are experiencing this kind of a bug. Please try to reinstall the game or/and restart your headset. You can also download the game from SideQuest: https://sidequestvr.com/app/13758/catos-vr-multiplayer-horror

reviews.review_description: Bro why the game dont work man, i just want to play the game with my friends and i cant play

developer_response.body:
We have lost the keystore file meaning we are not able to update the game on the applab version of catos, if you like, we have an apk you can sideload that has working multiplayer at: https://discord.gg/thecathorrorvr
in the #download-catos-apk channel

Hope this helped!

reviews.review_description: When I first played the game it was scary although I started to get used to it after four days there was someone screaming Ooga booga
I love this game but the monster needs a remake, sorry.🪨📄✂️

developer_response.body: i agree to much tho but ty!!!!!

reviews.review_description: I have see the of catos but I have not seen the old version The old version looks sick but that was in the past goodbye old catos
If I try to join a lobby I doesn’t work I’m too scared to go to the store

developer_response.body: Hello! Servers most of all the time are full. This will be fixed. You just need to keep pressing "rejoin" button in Servers tab every 10 seconds. Please change put 5 stars if you can😀 Thanks
